description: Live 2026 World Cup scores, fixtures & standings for your AI agent. No keys. Unofficial fan project.
name: io.github.arturogarrido/claudinho

environmentVariables.description: UI language: en, es, pt, or fr (optional; default en)
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDINHO_LANG

environmentVariables.description: IANA timezone for kickoff times, e.g. America/Mexico_City (optional; default system)
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDINHO_TZ

environmentVariables.description: Commentary flair: off, subtle, or full (optional; default full)
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDINHO_FLAVOR

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'off' to hide read-only prediction-market signals (optional; informational only)
environmentVariables.name: CLAUDINHO_MARKETS
